selection_rule: Choose production winner by validation class-1 F1, using validation PR-AUC as secondary tiebreak. Report final held-out test metrics separately.
price_source: Binance Spot public market-data REST API
live_price_source: Binance Spot public market-data REST API

Bitcoin.twitter_only: Historical-only unless a real ongoing live Twitter/sentiment source is configured.
Bitcoin.combined: Historical-only unless a real ongoing live Twitter/sentiment source is configured.
